parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 1200, system: 'Return valid JSON only. Follow references/content-intelligence-stage3-contract.md exactly.', messages: [ { role: 'user', content: [ { type: 'text', text: JSON.stringify($json.analysis_payload) } ] } ] } }}

={{ { model: 'gpt-4o-mini', input: [ { role: 'system', content: 'Return valid JSON only. Follow references/content-intelligence-stage3-contract.md exactly.' }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify($json.analysis_payload) } ] } }}

={{ { parent: { database_id: '398b59d3-b3b5-8010-bf18-efb9eb9c6767' }, properties: { 'Topic type': { select: { name: $json.playbook_payload.topic_type } }, 'Recommended format': { select: { name: $json.playbook_payload.recommended_format } }, 'Reasoning': { rich_text: [ { text: { content: $json.playbook_payload.reasoning || 'No reasoning provided' } } ] }, 'Example reference': { title: [ { text: { content: ($json.playbook_payload.example_reference || 'Untitled example').slice(0, 1800) } } ] }, 'Creator': { rich_text: [ { text: { content: $json.playbook_payload.creator_name || 'unknown' } } ] }, 'Source URL': { url: $json.playbook_payload.source_url || null } } } }}

parameters.content:
## Content Intelligence Pipeline v1
Weekly run: discover winning AI/automation creators, pull their video metadata, analyze format patterns with an LLM, and publish a Content Playbook.

**Flow reads left → right.** Each colored band is one stage.

## 1 · Discover & Fetch
Cron kicks off weekly → build search queries → Tavily finds candidate creators → filter to the reference set.

## 1b · Resolve YouTube channel → recent videos
Parse channel ID / @handle from the profile URL (no API cost), then channels → playlistItems → videos to pull metadata for recent uploads. Filters drop anything that can't be resolved.

## 2 · Normalize & Store   ·   3 · Analyze
Normalize each video to one canonical row, build the Stage 3 contract, then route to a model provider. Result is parsed and upserted to Supabase.

## 4 · Notion Content Playbook
Map analyzed videos to a Notion page payload. Analyzed rows are written to Notion; non-analyzed rows are skipped. Sync status is persisted back to Supabase.

## 5 · Feedback loop
Write a deterministic feedback status for every record. Stays `pending_first_party_data` until Sean's own post metrics exist.

### Parallel path ↑
Creator rows are upserted here and rejoin the batch at **Merge Upserts**.

### Batch bookkeeping ↑
Creator + video upserts merge, then **Mark Batch Complete** flags the batch as ingested so it isn't reprocessed.

### Provider Switch
`STAGE3_MODEL_PROVIDER` picks the branch:
**claude** (default) · **openai** (fallback) · **deferred** (skip model, persist status).

### Eligibility Switch
`analysis_status = analyzed` → write to Notion.
Anything else → Skip Notion.
